message:
fix: resolve clippy lints and apply cargo fmt

- Remove needless borrows in fnp-io test helpers (clippy::needless_borrows_for_generic_args)
- Allow excessive_precision on RNG witness tests (intentional full-precision constants)
- Apply cargo fmt to all modified files
